summary:
Amantadine ER is officially approved by the FDA as part of its label for treating influenza A and Parkinson's disease. Explicit mentions of "amantadine hydrochloride oral capsule ER 24 Hour" and "tablelet ER 24 Hour" in FDA documentation confirm the existence and authorization of this extended-release form. \boxed{A}

The provided information shows that amantadine ER is a recognized and approved medication through direct reference in FDA-approved drug products listed specifically as “extended-release” versions used for managing influenza A and Parkinson’s disease. Thus, it meets all criteria required for regulatory approval according to U.S. Food and Drug Administration standards. \boxed{A}
